mapper.select: SELECT * FROM inverter WHERE status_code BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inverter (plant_id, rated_capacity, type, efficiency, serial) VALUES (#{plantId}, #{ratedCapacity}, #{type}, #{efficiency}, #{serial})
mapper.update: UPDATE inverter SET measured_capacity = measured_capacity + #{measuredCapSurplus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND plant_id = #{plantId}

update.foreach: UPDATE inverter SET last_accum_energy = #{lastAccumEnergy}, current_power = #{currentPower}, status_code = #{statusCode}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE inverter SET last_accum_energy = #{item.lastAccumEnergy}, current_power = #{item.currentPower}, status_code = #{item.statusCode}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{item.id}
